features.name: unary operator with attribute
features.description: Code should include a unary operator immediately followed by an attribute specification

features.name: binary operator with attribute
features.description: Code should include a binary operator immediately followed by an attribute specification

features.name: ternary operator question mark with attribute
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with an attribute placed immediately after the question mark
features.snippet: assign y3 = a == b ? (* foobar *) y1 : y2;

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
